name: TARGET CORP
summary: Target Corporation, incorporated in Minnesota in 1902, operates as a single-segment retailer offering fashionable merchandise and everyday essentials at discounted prices. Products span six core categories including general merchandise and groceries, sold through physical stores and digital channels. Approximately 30% of merchandise sales come from owned and exclusive brands. Stores fulfill over 97% of total merchandise sales and serve as fulfillment hubs for digital orders.
